subject: Re: Ohio :)
body:
fine


----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, May 31, 2007 12:11:33 PM
Subject: Ohio :)

HI,
  Nice seeing you today!!
  
 I was thinking about your offer on sending me home and if it's still up I would like to take you up on it.  It's perfect because my niece has her first dance recital on Sunday so I would love to be there. I found a ticket for $318 but I would be landing at 8:15am on Monday so i will be a few minutes late, is this ok? 
  
 Also, I wanted to remind you  I will be filling in for Rahna a couple hours on Mondays and Wednesdays... I"ll do my best!



AOL now offers free email to everyone. Find out more about what's free from AOL at AOL.com.
body_html:
fine
